name: user-badge
title: User Badge
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Compact user identity display with avatar (or initial fallback), display name, and optional username handle. Three sizes.
docs: Pass `name` for the display name, optional `username` for the handle, and `avatarUrl` for the image. Falls back to colored initial when no image. Use `size` for sm/md/lg.
